Class Dice

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.Dice
public class Dice extends Observable
Class for the dice. Attacking player can have a maximum of 3 dices and the defender can have a maximum of 2 dices. It has methods for simulating the dice rolls for the attack phase
Author:
Palash Jain, Karandeep Singh

  • Constructor Details

    • Dice

      public Dice(Country attackingCountry, Country defendingCountry)
      Constructor for the dice class. It initializes the value of the attacking and defending countries.
      Parameters:
      attackingCountry - Country which is attacking currently
      defendingCountry - Country under attack

  • Method Details

    • getAttackingCountry

      public Country getAttackingCountry()
      Getter for the attacking Country.
      Returns:
      Attacking country.

    • setAttackingCountry

      public void setAttackingCountry(Country attackingCountry)
      Setter for attacking country
      Parameters:
      attackingCountry - Attacking country.

    • getAttackerDiceList

      public ArrayList<Integer> getAttackerDiceList()
      Getter for attacking dice values.
      Returns:
      list of values of the attacking dice.

    • setAttackerDiceList

      public void setAttackerDiceList(ArrayList<Integer> attackerDiceList)
      Setter for attacking dice values.
      Parameters:
      attackerDiceList - list of values of the attacking dice.

    • getDefendingCountry

      public Country getDefendingCountry()
      Getter for the defending Country.
      Returns:
      Country under attack

    • setDefendingCountry

      public void setDefendingCountry(Country defendingCountry)
      Setter for defending dice values.
      Parameters:
      defendingCountry - list of values of the defending dice.

    • getDefenderDiceList

      public ArrayList<Integer> getDefenderDiceList()
      Getter for defending dice values.
      Returns:
      list of values of the defending dice.

      public void setDefenderDiceList(ArrayList<Integer> defenderDiceList)
      Setter for defending dice values.
      Parameters:
      defenderDiceList - list of values of the defending dice.

    • getCountriesWonCount

      public int getCountriesWonCount()
      Getter for count of countries won
      Returns:
      Number of countries won by the player

    • setCountriesWonCount

      public void setCountriesWonCount(int countriesWonCount)
      Setter for count of countries won
      Parameters:
      countriesWonCount - Number of countries won by the player

    • getDicePlayResult

      public ArrayList<String> getDicePlayResult()
      Method for comparing the dice values of attacker and defender. It compares the value in descending order.
      Returns:
      List of the results of the dice throw

    • updateArmiesAfterAttack

      public void updateArmiesAfterAttack(Integer defenderValue, Integer attackerValue, ArrayList<String> playResult)
      Method is used to update the armies of the players, after the attack has been completed.
      Parameters:
      defenderValue - Values of defender dice
      attackerValue - Values of attacker dice
      playResult - List of attack results

    • cancelDiceThrow

      public void cancelDiceThrow()
      Method of indicate that the dice roll is complete or cancelled

    • skipMoveArmy

      public void skipMoveArmy()
      Method for skipping the army move after attacker has won the attack. But at least one army will move from attacking to defending country.

    • moveAllArmies

      public void moveAllArmies()
      Move All Armies

    • updateCountryList

      public void updateCountryList()
      Mehtod for updating the country list after attacker has won at least one country.

    • moveArmies

      public void moveArmies(int armiesToMove, javafx.scene.control.Label message, javafx.scene.control.Button moveArmies)
      Method for moving armies from attacker's country to the defending country, if attacks won the country.
      Parameters:
      armiesToMove - Number aries to move
      message - text fir the label which displays how many armies were moved
      moveArmies - Button to execute the method.

    • generateRandomNumber

      public int generateRandomNumber()
      Method for generating the dice value between 1 to 6.
      Returns:
      A random integer between 1 to 6.

    • checkDiceThrowPossible

      public boolean checkDiceThrowPossible()
      Check if attacker has sufficient number of armies
      Returns:
      true if attacker can execute the attack; else false.
